name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13664 Black & Colorful】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series coin purse is colorful and brilliant. Made of coated canvas, the vibrant iconic Monogram pattern reinterprets the brand logo with the rainbow tones theme of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a silver zipper and comes with a chain and hook, securely holding keys. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
